pass_criteria_met: Correctly lists all 5 steps in order: (1) Outline, (2) Plotting, (3) Lit Review, (4) Section Writing, (5) Content Refinement
Identifies parallel execution of Steps 2 and 3
Correctly states the reason (independent artifacts, Semantic Scholar rate limits)
Step 4 is ONE single call (confirmed with 'CRITICAL: ONE single call' in SKILL.md)
execution_log: Read SKILL.md. Extracted pipeline steps and their properties. Verified: Steps 2 and 3 are marked 'MUST run in parallel'; Step 4 marked 'CRITICAL: ONE single call'; Step 5 has default 3 iterations.
model_notes: Perfect adherence to pipeline documentation. Correctly identified all 5 steps, parallel execution requirement, and call counts.
